The '''''Obi-Wan''''' was the first [[Nebula-class Star Destroyer|''Nebula''-class Star Destroyer]] commissioned by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It was named in honor of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]].

{{Ship-stub}}
